evals.name: A_greenfield_stirling_electrician
evals.prompt: Build a website for the prospect slug 'stirling-burt-heating' using the template. It has no existing site. Deploy it and update the outreach CSV.
evals.expected_output: output/stirling-burt-heating.html exists, core/validate_filled_html.py exits 0 (no sentinels, no banned words, score ≥8), deploys.json contains a pages.dev URL for that slug, nowebsite_outreach.csv has one row for the slug with website_url = the pages.dev URL.

assertions.text: no [[WRITE_ sentinels remain in the HTML
website_url column in nowebsite_outreach.csv starts with https:// and ends with .pages.dev

evals.name: B_broken_aberdeen_kelgas
evals.prompt: Build a replacement site for 'aberdeen-kelgas-uk-limited' — their existing URL is dead. Use the template. Deploy and update CSV. Make sure current_website_url is preserved in the CSV for outreach reference.
evals.expected_output: Same as above, plus the CSV row has current_website_url pointing at the original broken URL from candidates.json.

assertions.text: CSV row has new website_url on .pages.dev

evals.name: C_placeholder_rewrite_faqs
evals.prompt: The FAQ answers on output/stirling-burt-heating.html feel generic — rewrite only the five FAQ answers to be more specific to a Stirling heating engineer, then re-validate and re-deploy.
evals.expected_output: Only the faq_{1..5} answers change. Hero, service, review content untouched. Validator still passes.

assertions.text: every faq_*_answer text is different from the prior version
